name: Water
description: An early concept mentioned in a knowledge text: Water.

open_questions.question: Water 是什么？它和当前学习主题有什么关系？
Water 是不是一种 Fruit，还是和 Fruit 不同？
open_questions.last_answer: This question needs more evidence. Treat the concept as temporarily unknown, record possible relations to known concepts, and continue looking for evidence.

open_questions.question: Water 是不是一种 Nutrient，还是和 Nutrient 不同？
open_questions.last_answer: Nutrient is not a fruit. Nutrient is a general category for substances that support BodyFunction and Health. Vitamin is a nutrient. Mineral is a nutrient. DietaryFiber is a nutrient. Potassium is a nutrient.

open_questions.question: Water 被 Grape 等概念通过“contains”联系起来。这说明 Water 在这些关系里扮演什么角色？
open_questions.last_answer: Grape is a fruit. Grapes can usually be eaten directly. Grape can be made into juice, raisins, and wine. Grape contains water and some vitamins.
